name: Swords Bard Archer
composition: College of Swords Bard 10-12 (often 2-level Fighter dip)
summary: Slashing Flourish doubles every ranged attack, so it out-damages dedicated archers while also having full bard spellcasting, the best skills, and the Band of the Mystic Scoundrel + Arcane Acuity combo to land any control spell as a bonus action. The #1 honour-mode build.
abilities: Dexterity primary (Gloves of Dexterity lets you skip it); Charisma secondary
source: The BEST CHARACTER in Baldur's Gate 3 - Swords Bard Archer Honour Build Guide

leveling.picks: Pick your instrument carefully (the choice is permanent). Bardic Inspiration online.

spike.note: Expertise + Bardic Inspiration — best dialogue/skills in the party from turn one.

choices.note: face skills + lockpicking on your high DEX
enables stealth-archery openers later
near-universal utility, basically required on everyone
consequence-free dialogue advantage
bonus-action heal · 2-turn lockdown · party-wide speed (ritual)
merchant prices / dialogue — or Speak with Animals

leveling.picks: Song of Rest + Jack of All Trades. Take an enchantment now for later bonus-action casting.

choices.note: enchantment cantrip → free bonus-action cast with Band of the Mystic Scoundrel
an enchantment to bonus-action later; swappable

leveling.picks: College of Swords: Slashing Flourish (the core — two attacks per action). Two-Weapon Fighting; Expertise in Sleight of Hand + Persuasion.

spike.note: Slashing Flourish (College of Swords) — two ranged attacks per action, the build's core.

choices.note: Slashing Flourish — two ranged attacks per action, the build's engine
double proficiency on your key skills
+2 to hit ranged — or Two-Weapon Fighting if you'll melee flourish
or another control spell

leveling.picks: Feat: Sharpshooter (+10 dmg applies to BOTH Flourish attacks). Cantrip Vicious Mockery (enchantment for the Mystic Scoundrel combo).

spike.note: Sharpshooter — the flat damage multiplier on every hit.

choices.note: enchantment lockdown — auto-fail saves, bonus-action via Mystic Scoundrel

leveling.picks: Font of Inspiration (refresh Bardic dice on a short rest). Hypnotic Pattern is top-tier control; Glyph of Warding is a non-concentration option.

choices.note: the best AOE control in the game; bonus-action it after an attack
pre-placed burst, or hold for Counterspell later

leveling.picks: Extra Attack — now four attacks a round with Slashing Flourish.

spike.note: Extra Attack — Slashing Flourish now lands four ranged hits per action.

choices.note: advantage/utility — or Slow / Glyph; nothing forced here

leveling.picks: Dip Fighter: Archery fighting style (+2 to hit), medium armour & shields.

choices.note: +2 to hit with every ranged attack — the whole point of the Fighter dip

leveling.picks: Action Surge — a full second set of four attacks (eight in the opening round).

spike.note: Action Surge (Fighter 2) — a full second volley; opening-turn nova.

leveling.picks: Back to Bard. Confusion is a bonus-action enchantment that won't hit allies — or Greater Invisibility for stealth-archery.

choices.note: AOE enchantment; bonus-action via Mystic Scoundrel to shut down a fight
if you like stealth-archery; otherwise skip

leveling.picks: Feat: Alert (+5 initiative; with 18 Dex from the Gloves you almost always go first). Freedom of Movement as a panic button, or Plant Growth.

choices.note: anti-control insurance — or swap for utility

leveling.picks: 5th-level spells: Hold Monster — bonus-action lockdown on nearly anything.

choices.note: single-target lockdown on bosses immune to Hold Person

leveling.picks: Magical Secrets + more Expertise + a cantrip. Pull a top spell off another list (e.g. Counterspell or Haste).

spike.note: Magical Secrets (Bard 10) — Counterspell and other top-tier non-bard spells.

choices.note: Magical Secrets — the best reaction in the game
burst finisher — or Globe of Invulnerability / another AOE

respecNote: Respeccing at level 7+? Take the first Fighter level FIRST — Fighter grants CON-save proficiency (concentration), and saves come only from your starting class; your spell DC still uses Charisma since Bard is taken second. Below level 7 you can't afford the dip, so lead with Bard.

abilityScores.note: Want more durability? Drop CHA to 14 and run CON 16. With Gloves of Dexterity (sets DEX to 18) you can dump DEX to 8 and move those points into CON 16 / WIS 14.

name: Eldritch Knight Thrower
role: Ranged physical DPS, extremely tanky and forgiving
summary: Throws weapons (which use Tavern Brawler and apply all weapon effects at range) for up to seven near-guaranteed hits in the opening round. The highest first-turn burst of the martials, plus heavy armour + the Shield spell make it the hardest character in the game to kill — the most forgiving build to win honour mode with.
abilities: Strength build, but the Cloud/Hill Giant elixir sets STR — dump STR to 8 and lead with DEX/CON
keyItems: Gloves of Heroism / Strange Conduit Ring
source: The CONSISTENT KILLER - [Updated] BG3 Lae'zel / Fighter Thrower Honour Build Guide

leveling.picks: Fighting Style: Defence. Second Wind.

spike.note: Fighter chassis — ~20 base AC and strong from level one; no 'wait for it to come online'.

leveling.picks: Action Surge — a whole extra round of throws.

spike.note: Action Surge (Fighter 2) — an extra full action of thrown attacks.

leveling.picks: Subclass: Eldritch Knight. Bind a thrown weapon; learn Longstrider + Shield.

spike.note: Eldritch Knight (Fighter 3) — bind your thrown weapon so it returns; War Magic bonus action.

leveling.picks: Feat: Tavern Brawler (the core of the build). Drink a Strength elixir from here on.
War Cleric dip — heavy armour, shields, martial weapons, and War Priest bonus-action attacks. Prepare Bless + Create Water. (Taken after Fighter, so you keep Fighter's CON save.)

spike.note: War Cleric dip — heavy armour, Channel Divinity, and War Priest bonus-action throws.

leveling.picks: Extra Attack — now three throws per action with Action Surge.

spike.note: Extra Attack (Fighter 5) — doubles your thrown attacks.

leveling.picks: Feat: Alert (go first almost every fight).
Eldritch Knight: War Magic.
Feat: ASI — top up Strength (or Athlete) if not relying on the elixir.
Indomitable — reroll a failed save.
Eldritch Knight: extra War Magic / utility cantrips.
Improved Extra Attack — three main-action throws (seven in the opening round with Action Surge + the cleric bonus throw).

spike.note: Improved Extra Attack (Fighter 11) — three attacks; with the bonus-action throw + Action Surge, a massive thrown nova.

respecNote: Take Fighter first — it grants CON-save proficiency (concentration) and the 19–20 base AC, and saves come only from your starting class. The War Cleric dip is optional: slot it once you're level 5+ (you keep Fighter's saves), or skip it for a third attribute feat.

abilityScores.note: Elixir build: drink Hill/Cloud Giant Strength daily (it sets STR to 23/27), so STR is dumped to 8. Min-max spread runs DEX 17 / CON 15 / INT 12 and evens them out with later feats. No elixir? Max STR instead.

name: Open Hand Monk
role: Melee burst + sustained DPS with free crowd control
composition: Way of the Open Hand Monk 9 / Thief Rogue 3
summary: Thief's second bonus action means up to 8-10 attacks a turn of Flurry of Blows, all near-guaranteed via Tavern Brawler, plus free prone/push on Flurry and frequent Stunning Strikes. The best melee character in the game — most fights end before the enemy acts.
abilities: Very MAD: Strength + Dexterity + Wisdom + Constitution (Strength elixir is effectively mandatory)
keyItems: Gloves of Cinder and Sizzle / Caustic Band
source: The BEST MONK in Baldur's Gate 3 - [Updated] Honour Build Guide

leveling.picks: Unarmored Defense, Martial Arts. Start with high Dex/Wis (Strength comes from the daily elixir).
Ki: Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind.
Subclass: Way of the Open Hand (crowd control on Flurry).

spike.note: Way of the Open Hand (Monk 3) — Flurry of Blows riders: knock prone, push, or deny reactions.

leveling.picks: Feat: Tavern Brawler. Start drinking a Strength elixir each day.
Extra Attack + Stunning Strike (uses your Str/Dex save DC — very strong).

spike.note: Extra Attack + Stunning Strike (Monk 5) — lock down bosses for the party.

leveling.picks: Expertise + Sneak Attack; great skills.
Cunning Action (bonus-action Dash/Disengage/Hide).
Subclass: Thief — the second bonus action (more Flurries).

spike.note: Thief (Rogue 3) — a second bonus action = an extra Flurry of Blows; the unarmed-DPS spike.

leveling.picks: Ki-Empowered Strikes; Manifestation of Body damage rider.
Evasion; Stillness of Mind.
Feat: ASI Wisdom (AC + damage + DCs) — or Alert.
Improved Flurry / extra ki — peak sustained damage.

abilityScores.note: The Strength elixir is effectively required — it sets STR, so dump it and run DEX 16 / WIS 16. Without the elixir the build is too ability-hungry to function.

name: Berserker Barbarian Thrower
role: Ranged physical DPS with built-in prone control
composition: Berserker Barbarian 5 / Thief Rogue 4 / Fighter 3 (splits vary)
summary: Berserker's bonus-action throw + Thief's second bonus action + Action Surge = a flood of Tavern-Brawler throws that never miss, each of which can knock prone. Slightly less first-turn burst than the EK thrower (a setup turn to rage), but enormous sustained damage and control.
abilities: Strength primary (Strength elixir effectively required for this split)
source: GO FOR THE EYES BOO - The Ultimate Boo Throwing Build - BG3 Minsc Barbarian / Rogue Honour Guide

leveling.picks: Rage + Unarmored Defence. Throw weapons from level one — your rage damage rides every throw.

spike.note: Rage — resistance to physical damage; a durable frontliner immediately.

leveling.picks: Reckless Attack (advantage on Strength attacks) + Danger Sense.
Subclass: Berserker — Frenzy gives a bonus-action throw every turn while raging.

spike.note: Berserker (Barb 3) — Frenzy grants a bonus-action thrown attack every turn.

leveling.picks: Feat: Tavern Brawler — the core; throws stop missing. Drink a Strength elixir each day from here.

spike.note: Tavern Brawler — Strength counted twice on thrown attacks; the damage engine.

leveling.picks: Extra Attack — two throws per action plus the Frenzy bonus throw.
Dip Rogue: Expertise + Sneak Attack added to a throw.
Cunning Action — bonus-action Dash / Disengage / Hide.
Subclass: Thief — a SECOND bonus action = two extra throws every turn.

spike.note: Thief (Rogue 3) — extra bonus-action throw stacks more attacks.

leveling.picks: Feat: Alert (go first) — or ASI Strength if not on the elixir.
Dip Fighter: Defence fighting style, heavy armour.
Action Surge — a flood of extra throws, each able to knock prone.
Subclass: Champion (crit fishing) or Battle Master (Trip/Menacing maneuvers). Peak sustained throwing.

abilityScores.note: Strength elixir (Hill/Cloud Giant) is required for this split — it sets STR, so dump it to 8 and pump CON 16. Tavern Brawler then adds the elixir STR to thrown attacks twice over.

name: Abjuration Wizard (Tank Wizard)
summary: Arcane Ward soaks enormous flat damage and is trivially refreshed with Glyph of Warding, so the character is near-unkillable; the White Dragon Sorcerer dip adds Armor of Agathys for ~60 cold retaliation (doubled when enemies are Wet) every time they hit you. A full wizard that simply cannot die.
abilities: Intelligence primary; one Sorcerer level taken first for Con save proficiency
keyItems: The Sparkle Hands / Bonespike Garb (extra damage reduction)
source: The ULTIMATE WIZARD - BG3 Honour Mode Abjuration Magic Missile Gale Build Guide

leveling.picks: Take a White Draconic Sorcerer level FIRST for Constitution-save proficiency. Mage Armour + Shield; Armour of Agathys for cold retaliation.

spike.note: Armour of Agathys + Shield from the Sorcerer-1 dip — early durability.

leveling.picks: Switch to Wizard. Magic Missile is your reliable, save-less damage; Find Familiar for utility.
Subclass: Abjuration — Arcane Ward. Every abjuration spell you cast refills the ward.

spike.note: Abjuration (Wizard 2) — Arcane Ward soaks damage and refreshes on every abjuration; near-unkillable.

leveling.picks: 2nd-level slots. Upcast Armour of Agathys to charge the ward and punish attackers.
Feat: Resilient (Con) or War Caster — lock down concentration.
3rd-level: Glyph of Warding refills the ward for free every turn; Counterspell shuts down enemy casters.

spike.note: Counterspell + Glyph of Warding — shut down enemy casters and pre-place burst.

leveling.picks: Abjuration: Projected Ward — share the ward with allies.
4th-level: Ice Storm / Evard's Black Tentacles for control while you're unkillable.
Feat: ASI — Intelligence to 20 (bigger ward, higher DCs).
5th-level slots; more abjurations to keep the ward topped up.
Globe of Invulnerability — total immunity bubble on top of the ward.
6th-level slots: Chain Lightning or a Markoheshkir nuke while nothing can touch you.

spike.note: Level-6 spells (Chain Lightning) — your scaling control/damage online.

abilityScores.note: One Sorcerer level is taken first for CON-save proficiency. With a +1 INT item or Auntie Ethel's Hair, start INT 17 to reach 18.

name: Lightning Lord
summary: Quicken Create Water (Wet = double lightning), maximise a 6th-level Witch Bolt or Chromatic Orb with Tempest Cleric's Destructive Wrath, and you do a guaranteed ~300 damage to one target turn one. Divination portent dice guarantee the hit; full sorcerer utility/control rounds it out.
abilities: Charisma primary; start the first level as Cleric/Sorcerer for Con saves
source: The ONE SHOT LIGHTNING LORD - [Updated] BG3 Honour Mode Build Guide

leveling.picks: Start Tempest Cleric: heavy armour and the spells that set up the combo. Prepare Create Water + Bless.

spike.note: Create Water — sets up Wet to double your lightning/cold damage.

leveling.picks: Destructive Wrath — Channel Divinity to MAXIMISE one lightning/thunder roll (no dice).

spike.note: Destructive Wrath (Tempest Cleric 2) — max-roll the damage of a lightning/thunder spell.

leveling.picks: Multiclass Sorcerer (Draconic, Blue/Storm). Chromatic Orb (lightning) + Shield.
Metamagic: Quickened (to Quicken Create Water) + Twinned.
2nd-level: Witch Bolt — the spell you'll upcast into a single huge hit.
Feat: Alert — go first and drop the nuke before anything moves.
3rd-level: Lightning Bolt + Haste.

spike.note: Lightning Bolt + Haste, with Quicken/Twin metamagic — the nuke turns begin.

leveling.picks: Elemental Affinity (Storm) — add Charisma to your lightning damage.
4th-level slots; more sorcery points for Quicken.
Feat: ASI — Charisma to 20 (bigger maximised hit).
Divination Wizard dip; scribe scrolls. Portent dice incoming.
Two Portent dice GUARANTEE the hit. Full-caster level 12 = 6th-level slots: a maximised, Wet-doubled Witch Bolt for ~300 to one target turn one.

spike.note: Divination Wizard 2 — Portent dice + scribe Chain Lightning; Heightened max-damage nukes.

respecNote: Respeccing? Take the first Sorcerer level FIRST — Sorcerer grants CON-save proficiency (concentration for Haste), and saves come only from your starting class. Take the Tempest Cleric levels after.

abilityScores.note: Sorcerer is taken first for CON-save proficiency (concentration on Haste). +1 CHA item / Ethel's Hair → start CHA 17 for an eventual 18.

name: Cleric (Light / Tempest / Nature)
role: Control + support + tank + the broken item engines
summary: 12 levels of cleric is just that good: top-tier utility (Guidance, Aid, Heroes' Feast), the easiest access to radiant-orb / reverberation stacking via Spirit Guardians, the buff-on-heal item combo, and (Light) Warding Flare to be nearly unhittable. Fills any combat role; only weakness is skills.
abilities: Wisdom primary; take a perception race to bring a key skill
source: The 11 BEST BUILDS in Baldur's Gate 3 - Honour Mode Guide

leveling.picks: Pick your domain (Light = Warding Flare to be nearly unhittable). Guidance, Bless, Sacred Flame, Create Water.

spike.note: Full support online — Bless, healing, Sacred Flame, Guidance.

leveling.picks: Channel Divinity (domain effect). Spiritual Weapon coming next level.
2nd-level: Spiritual Weapon (bonus-action damage) + Aid (party HP).
Feat: Alert (or ASI Wisdom).
3rd-level: Spirit Guardians — the radiant-orb / reverberation engine with Luminous Armour.

spike.note: Spirit Guardians (Cleric 5) — the cleric damage + control engine.

leveling.picks: Domain Channel Divinity upgrade.
4th-level: Death Ward + Guardian of Faith.
Feat: ASI — Wisdom (AC via Light, DCs, healing).
5th-level: Greater Restoration + Mass Cure Wounds.
Divine Intervention; domain capstone.
6th-level: Heroes' Feast (whole party, all day) + Heal.

spike.note: Heroes' Feast + Heal (Cleric 11) — party-wide buffs and big single-target healing.

leveling.picks: Final feat. Full utility online — fills any role.

abilityScores.note: Heavy-armour cleric, so DEX can stay low. +1 WIS item / Ethel's Hair → start WIS 17 to reach 18.

name: Fire Sorcerer
summary: Elemental Affinity adds Charisma to every instance of fire damage, and an upcast Scorching Ray fires up to seven beams — so you apply your (maxed) Charisma seven-plus times a turn, then Twin or Quicken a second one. Almost nothing survives, with full sorcerer control/utility as backup.
keyItems: Helmet of Arcane Acuity / Hat of Fire Acuity
source: BURN IT ALL DOWN - [Updated] Baldur's Gate 3 Fire Sorcerer Honour Build Guide

leveling.picks: Draconic Bloodline: Red (fire). Pick Shield + Mage Armour; start 16 Charisma. Magic Missile / Chromatic Orb for the early game.
Metamagic: Quickened Spell + Twinned Spell.
Scorching Ray — your main damage spell from here.

spike.note: Scorching Ray (Sorc 3) — strong multi-hit single-target early.

leveling.picks: Feat: Alert (or ASI Charisma).
3rd-level slots: Fireball, Haste.

spike.note: Fireball + Haste, with Twin/Quicken metamagic — the blaster turns begin.

leveling.picks: Elemental Affinity (Fire) — add Charisma to all fire damage. The build comes online.
4th-level slots: Wall of Fire.
Feat: ASI — Charisma to 20.
5th-level slots: upcast Scorching Ray / Cone of Cold.
Extra Metamagic: Heightened or Distant.
6th-level slots: a seven-beam Scorching Ray.

spike.note: Level-6 spells + max sorcery points — double-Fireball / Quickened nova.

leveling.picks: Feat: Elemental Adept (Fire) to ignore resistance, or another ASI.

abilityScores.note: Pure Sorcerer already grants CON-save proficiency. +1 CHA item / Ethel's Hair → start CHA 17 (move a point off CON if needed) to reach 18.

name: Assassin Archer
role: Opening-round burst archer, very tanky and safe
composition: Gloomstalker Ranger 5 / Assassin Rogue 3 / Fighter 4 (Battle Master)
summary: Dread Ambusher + Assassin's restored action + Action Surge gives six-to-eight attacks in the surprise round, all auto-crits. One-shots the most dangerous enemy before the fight starts, while being a high-AC, high-initiative, single-attribute archer that's hard to kill.
abilities: Dexterity primary (Gloves of Dexterity free up feats)
source: The BEST ARCHER in Baldur's Gate 3 - [Updated] Honor Mode Build Guide

leveling.picks: Favoured Enemy / Natural Explorer. Hunter's Mark + a bow.
Archery fighting style (+2 to hit).
Subclass: Gloomstalker — Dread Ambusher (extra attack + bonus speed on turn one); invisible in darkness.
Feat: Sharpshooter (+10 dmg; offset the −5 with stealth/height/advantage).

spike.note: Sharpshooter — the flat damage multiplier on every shot.

leveling.picks: Extra Attack.

spike.note: Gloomstalker (Ranger 5) — Dread Ambusher: an extra first-turn attack + invisibility in the dark.

leveling.picks: Dip Rogue: Expertise + Sneak Attack.
Cunning Action — bonus-action Hide to keep getting Sneak Attack & advantage.
Subclass: Assassin — automatic crits vs surprised enemies; action restored on turn one.

spike.note: Assassin (Rogue 3) — auto-crit on the surprised/first turn; a huge alpha strike.

leveling.picks: Dip Fighter: a second fighting style (Defence).
Action Surge — even more auto-crit attacks in the surprise round.

spike.note: Action Surge (Fighter 2) — doubles the opening burst.

leveling.picks: Subclass: Battle Master — Trip Attack / Menacing maneuvers for control + bonus dice.
Feat: Alert — guarantee the surprise round (or ASI Dex if not using Gloves of Dexterity).

abilityScores.note: Ranger wants some WIS for perception and spell saves. With Gloves of Dexterity (sets DEX 18), dump DEX and put the points into CON 16 / WIS 14.

name: Moon Druid
summary: The best early-game character: bonus-action wild shape (spider webs, then strong melee forms via Tavern Brawler) plus game-winning spells like Spike Growth from level 2. Multiple HP bars, the best summons (Myrmidons, Woodland Being), needs only Wisdom and no contested items.
abilities: Wisdom only (wild-shape forms use their own stats)
source: The 11 BEST BUILDS in Baldur's Gate 3 - Honour Mode Guide

leveling.picks: Wisdom only — no contested gear. Shillelagh + Produce Flame cantrips.

spike.note: Wildshape HP pool — a disposable second health bar; tanky from level one.

leveling.picks: Circle of the Moon: bonus-action Combat Wild Shape (Bear). Spike Growth — game-winning control from level 2.
2nd-level: Moonbeam (movable radiant column) + Flaming Sphere.
Feat: Tavern Brawler — makes your melee Wild Shape forms hit hard. Wild Shape: Owlbear.

spike.note: Tavern Brawler + early beast forms — reliable wildshape damage.

leveling.picks: 3rd-level: Call Lightning (re-cast each turn for free) + Sleet Storm.

spike.note: Call Lightning + stronger forms (Owlbear) — your damage spikes hard.

leveling.picks: Circle of the Moon: Primal Strike — Wild Shape attacks count as magical.
4th-level: Conjure Woodland Beings — one of the best summons in the game.
Feat: Resilient (Con) or War Caster — protect concentration on your summons.
5th-level: Conjure Elemental (Myrmidons) + Insect Plague.
Elemental Wild Shape — Myrmidon forms with multiattack.
6th-level: Heal + Sunbeam.

spike.note: Sunbeam + Myrmidon/elemental forms — late-game powerhouse.

leveling.picks: Peak Wild Shape forms + best summons; multiple HP bars that never run out.

abilityScores.note: Wild-shape forms use their own stats, so only your WIS (spell DC) and CON (concentration + the bonus HP) matter — dump everything else.

name: Lockadin (Paladin / Warlock)
role: Melee burst + control, all on Charisma
composition: Paladin 6-7 / Warlock 5-6 (Pact of the Blade, often Great Old One)
summary: Smite with short-rest warlock slots far more often than a normal paladin, with everything (attacks, spells, smites) keyed to Charisma. Adds Eldritch Blast, Hunger of Hadar, Darkness abuse, and high-DC Command — huge burst, great control, great face skills. Slower to come online (level ~7).
abilities: Charisma primary (attacks via Pact of the Blade)
source: The BEST WARLOCK in Baldur's Gate 3 - [Updated] Patch 8 Wyll Hexblade Honour Build Guide

leveling.picks: Hexblade with Pact of the Blade at level 1: Charisma weapon attacks + short-rest slots. Eldritch Blast + Hex.

spike.note: Eldritch Blast + Hex (Hexblade) — ranged pressure and a CHA-scaling chassis.

leveling.picks: Invocations: Agonizing Blast (+Cha to Eldritch Blast) + Devil's Sight (see in magical Darkness).
2nd-level short-rest slots. Abuse Darkness with Devil's Sight for advantage.
Feat: ASI Charisma (everything keys off it) — or Alert.
3rd-level short-rest slots: Hunger of Hadar (control) + Counterspell. These slots fuel your smites.

spike.note: Pact of the Blade + Thirsting Blade (Warlock 5) — extra attack with short-rest slots to fuel smites.

leveling.picks: Multiclass Paladin: Divine Sense, Lay on Hands, and Smite on hit.
Divine Smite + Fighting Style — burn short-rest warlock slots for radiant bursts far more often than a pure paladin.
Oath (Ancients/Vengeance) + Channel Divinity.

spike.note: Divine Smite (Paladin 3) — dump warlock spell slots into burst smites.

leveling.picks: Feat: Alert (or finish Charisma).
Extra Attack — two smiting swings a turn.
Aura of Protection — add your (huge) Charisma to all party saves. Build-defining.
Oath feature at Paladin 7. Peak Charisma smite + control + face skills.

abilityScores.note: Every attack and smite scales off Charisma via Pact of the Blade. +1 CHA item / Ethel's Hair → start CHA 17 for an 18.
